atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hematuria and recurrent episodes of bright red urine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports passing two small stones approximately one week prior to this appointment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports several episodes of bright red urine over the past six weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports these episodes are typically associated with zero flank pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports these episodes have improved since passing the stones.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking Alavert 10 milligrams daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no drug allergies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient desires strategies to prevent recurrence of these stone episodes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he will avoid food rich in sodium oxalate and animal protein.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Renal ultrasound revealed a six millimeter left renal stone, non-obstructing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Urine dipstick showed trace amounts of blood.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The urine dipstick showed a specific gravity of 1.020.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The urine dipstick showed urobilinogen 0.2.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The urine is yellow and clear with a pH of 5.5.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Recommend dietary modifications

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: to reduce sodium oxalate and animal protein intake

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule follow-up in one year

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: unless the patient experiences further episodes of bleeding or pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: in which case they should contact the office sooner

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Advise the patient to seek emergency room care for severe pain or significant hematuria.
